allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement Phase 1 - Mnemosyne experiential memory layer

Complete MVP implementation of the core lesson extraction and retrieval loop:

Backend API \(FastAPI\):
- POST /api/v1/traces - ingest agent execution traces
- GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/lessons - lesson CRUD
- POST /api/v1/retrieve - vector similarity search with formatted context

Services:
- embedding.py - sentence-transformers \(BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384-dim\)
- extraction.py - Claude API lesson extraction from traces
- retrieval.py - pgvector cosine similarity search
- ingestion.py - full trace→lesson pipeline

Infrastructure:
- PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector with HNSW index
- Redis for Celery task queue
- Alembic async migrations
- Docker Compose for local development

Python SDK:
- MnemosyneClient and AsyncMnemosyneClient
- retrieve\(\), ingest_trace\(\), create_lesson\(\) methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from app.api.routes import lessons, traces, retrieve; print\('imports OK'\)" 2>&1)
